'''Ulicx Vinaq''' was a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] known for his many facial piercings.

==Biography==
After losing a large amount of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to Vinaq, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Desh (Imperial)|Desh]] planted a crate of Imperial weapons on the Devaronian's ship and issued an arrest order for Vinaq. He was a known associate of the Devaronian trader [[Merrilet Gorron]].
